description: German credit risk data, StatLog collection
proposed_title: UCI German Credit Risk by Loan Purpose and Age Group (StatLog, 1994)
treatment_variable: purpose (col 4: A40=car new, A41=car used, A42=furniture, A43=radio/TV, etc.)
stratum_variable: age_group (col 13: age in years, binned into young/middle/senior)
encoding_note: No header row; 21 columns using UCI coded values. Col 21: 1=good credit (success), 2=bad credit (failure). Col 4 = purpose (loan type as treatment). Col 13 = age (continuous, bin into young/middle/senior as stratum). Compute Successes=count(col21==1) and Cases=total per (purpose × age_group) cell.
